title: Light Nourishment
subtitle: Supporting ease and readiness
description: As you approach delivery, your appetite may be lighter and your focus shifts toward comfort and ease. Gentle, light meals and proper hydration can help maintain your energy and support overall readiness.
what_to_expect: Increased tiredness and need for rest
Preference for light and simple foods
nutrition_focus: Eat light, small meals based on comfort
recommended_foods: Light meals like khichdi, dal, soft roti, rice, and simple sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, and pomegranate
Soft vegetables like spinach, pumpkin, carrots, and beans
Comfort foods like curd, soups, smoothies, and fruit bowls
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water in small, frequent sips
Include fluids like coconut water, buttermilk, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Light and gentle nourishment helps support your comfort and energy.

diabetes.personalized_description: Small, frequent, and balanced meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent, balanced intake supports steady energy.

anemia.personalized_description: Iron-rich foods in small portions support energy and help maintain strength.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and hydration support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Small, consistent meals support metabolic balance and energy.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on light, frequent meals and hydration helps maintain comfort and stability.
priority_nutrition: Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle nourishment supports your comfort and readiness.
